untranslatable_reason: Flag pattern detection (stair-stepping price action, flag formation geometry, tight range definition) requires multi-bar pattern recognition not available in provided indicators. The specific 'flag high' and 'flag bottom/support' levels are pattern-derived values that cannot be calculated from standard technical indicators without custom pattern detection logic.
translation_notes: Translated entry as breakout above previous high (approximation of flag high breakout). Exit approximated using pivot support level (s1) as proxy for flag bottom support. The 3% stop loss is conservative estimate based on 'tight flag' description and 11% failure rate noted. Pattern-specific thresholds (flag height, flag duration, stair-step definition) are not quantifiable with standard indicators and require visual/pattern detection engine.
